title: Rubio expected to meet with Pope Leo amid Trump’s clash with pontiff on Iran
summary_full: The secretary of state is set to travel to Italy this week, a Vatican official said. Observers view the trip as an attempt to patch up ties with the Vatican and Italy.
summary_public: The secretary of state is set to travel to Italy this week, a Vatican official said. Observers view the trip as an attempt to patch up ties with the Vatican and Italy.
